title: SatiCentral.FitnessVector
description: Authoritative definition of all global fitness metrics for Sati-Central. Every metric has a name, unit, collection method, evaluation direction, weight, and auto-escalation threshold. This schema is machine-read by the evaluation engine — not documentation.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Increment minor for additive changes, major for breaking changes.

timestamp_ms.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when this snapshot was written.

evaluation_period_ms.description: Window over which rate metrics are evaluated. Default: 86400000 (24h).

metrics.description: Map of metric_id → MetricState. All five global metrics must be present in a valid snapshot.

safety_compliance.description: Count of safety constraint violations per day. Any violation triggers auto-escalation to Analyst Droid.

x-metric-meta.collection_method: Counter emitted by safety-rail on each SafetyVerdict::Unsafe result. OTel metric name: sati_central.safety.violations_total

audit_integrity.description: Count of Merkle consistency check failures. Any failure triggers auto-escalation.

auto_escalation_threshold.description: Any Merkle consistency failure — no tolerance.

x-metric-meta.collection_method: Counter emitted by root-spine merkle package on each consistency check failure. OTel metric name: sati_central.audit.consistency_failures_total

dhamma_alignment.description: Aggregate MoralWeighting score from Dhamma-Adviser, 0.0–1.0. Below 0.6 triggers auto-escalation.

auto_escalation_threshold.description: Score below 0.6 requires Analyst Droid review.

x-metric-meta.collection_method: Gauge emitted by dhamma-adviser on each MoralWeighting evaluation. OTel metric name: sati_central.dhamma.alignment_score

system_performance.description: Composite of p99 request latency and throughput. p99 > 500ms triggers auto-escalation.

auto_escalation_threshold.description: p99 latency above 500ms requires Analyst Droid review.

operational_cost.description: USD/day for tokens + API. 20% week-over-week increase triggers auto-escalation.

auto_escalation_threshold.description: More than 20% week-over-week cost increase requires Analyst Droid review.

x-metric-meta.collection_method: Gauge emitted by each factory's cost accounting module. OTel metric name: sati_central.cost.usd_per_day

previous_value.description: Previous period value for delta computation. Null if no prior measurement.

status.description: green=healthy, amber=degrading within threshold, red=threshold breached, uninitialized=no data yet.

last_updated_ms.description: Unix epoch milliseconds of last update.

escalation_triggered.description: True if this metric currently meets auto-escalation conditions.

note.description: Optional human-readable note from the emitting component.

sub_metrics.description: Map of sub-metric name → current value.
